name: example-banking-cto
description: Synthetic example — VP Engineering applying for CTO at a Fortune-500 bank. Use as a template for adding real fixtures.

resume_data.name: Jane Doe
key_achievements: Scaled engineering org from 10 to 45 engineers over 4 years while holding attrition below 8%.
Delivered $2.4M in annualized cloud cost reductions via multi-region migration to AWS.
Led SOC 2 Type II certification and architected the compliance control set (42 controls).

requirements: 15+ years leading engineering at regulated financial institutions
Proven track record scaling engineering organizations through 3x growth
Deep expertise in cloud architecture, preferably AWS or multi-cloud
Experience owning the technology P&L at division level
Demonstrated ability to partner with the CISO on regulatory audits (OCC, FDIC, SOC 2)

letter_plan.opening_hook: Position the candidate as someone who has already done the hard part — scaling a regulated engineering org through explosive growth without sacrificing compliance posture.
body_points: Scaled 10→45 engineers with low attrition — demonstrates the org-building maturity required for a Fortune-500 bank.
$2.4M cost reductions via cloud migration — ties the candidate's cloud expertise to the P&L ownership the JD demands.
SOC 2 Type II + 42-control set — directly addresses the compliance partnership requirement and the CISO-collaboration culture cue.
letter_plan.closing_strategy: Acknowledge the specific regulatory stakes of a Fortune-500 bank CTO role (OCC, FDIC); position the candidate as someone who has operated in those environments rather than someone eager to learn them.
